table.noDataDescription: Create a new shift to get started.

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this shift?
delete.error: Error deleting shift. Please try again.

deleteError.title: Error
deleteError.description: Error deleting shift. Please try again.

createSuccess.title: Shift created successfully
createSuccess.description: The shift has been created correctly

updateSuccess.title: Shift updated successfully
updateSuccess.description: The shift has been updated correctly

massAssignmentSuccess.title: Mass assignment completed
massAssignmentSuccess.description: Schedule "{scheduleName}" has been assigned to {count} day(s)

selectionRequired.title: Selection required
selectionRequired.description: Please select at least one day to assign schedule in bulk

validation.companiesRequired: Please select at least one company

invalidSchedules.title: Some schedules do not apply
invalidSchedules.description: {count, plural, one {One assigned schedule is not available for this shift's companies and was removed from the grid. Please reassign that day.} other {# assigned schedules are not available for this shift's companies and were removed from the grid. Please reassign those days.}}

summary.warningMessage: The total of {hours} weekly hours exceeds the legal limit of {limit} hours. It is recommended to adjust the schedule to comply with labor regulations.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Shifts module
welcome.description: In this module you can manage rotating shifts (weekly or by days). This guide will show you the main features.

filters.title: Search filters
filters.description: Filter by name, rotation type, number of days or weeks. Use Search to apply and Clear to reset.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: Create new shifts or download the list to Excel. Buttons depend on your permissions.

table.title: Shifts table
table.description: List with name, type (weekly/days), days, weeks and dates. Use the edit button to modify or delete to deactivate.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.

welcome.title: Shift Editor
welcome.description: Configure the shift: name, companies, rotation type and assign schedules to each day. Follow the guide to learn each section.

basicInfo.title: Basic data
basicInfo.description: Enter the shift name, select companies and review the work hours and meal break summary.

nomenclature.title: Nomenclature
nomenclature.description: Define how days are identified in reports (e.g. Free, D 1, S1, etc.).

rotationConfig.title: Rotation type
rotationConfig.description: Choose Weekly Rotation (days per week) or Daily Rotation. Configure days/weeks according to the type.

massAssignment.title: Mass assignment
massAssignment.description: Select multiple days and assign the same schedule at once. Useful for repetitive shifts.

scheduleGrid.title: Schedule assignment
scheduleGrid.description: Click each cell to assign a schedule to the day. The system automatically detects conflicts.

submit.title: Save
submit.description: Save the shift. Cannot save if there are unresolved schedule conflicts.
